timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.

description: The new drink reached the public through soda-fountain sales.

description: Candler moved to gain control of the product and brand.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.
title: Pemberton dies
description: The creator's death left control of the business to others.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.

description: The brand secured U.S. trademark protection.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.

description: The drink started moving beyond soda fountains into bottles.

description: Bottling expansion accelerated national distribution.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.

description: The company eliminated cocaine from the beverage formula.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.
title: Contour bottle introduced
description: The distinctive bottle became one of the brand's defining symbols.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.
title: Company sold to investor group
description: Ownership shifted in a major corporate transaction.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.

description: A new leadership era began with aggressive expansion.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.
title: Olympic sponsorship era begins
description: Coca-Cola linked itself to global sport on a major stage.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.
title: Coke name becomes registered trademark
description: The shortened brand identity gained formal legal protection.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.
title: Minute Maid acquired
description: The company broadened beyond cola into other beverages.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.
title: Diet Coke launched
description: A major new product line reshaped the company's portfolio.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.
title: New Coke introduced
description: The reformulation sparked one of the most famous consumer backlashes in business history.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.

description: The original formula returned after public protest.

timeline_description: Major corporate, product, and global expansion milestones in the history of Coca-Cola.
title: Coca-Cola remains one of the world's largest beverage companies
description: The company continued as a dominant global drinks business and brand.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.

description: Iran and Iraq temporarily settled part of their border dispute.

description: The fall of the shah unsettled the regional balance and Iraqi calculations.

description: Baghdad declared the 1975 settlement void before launching war.

description: Iraqi forces crossed the border and began the war.

title: Khorramshahr campaign begins
description: Some of the war's fiercest early fighting centered on the city.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Iran halts initial Iraqi advance
description: Iraq failed to secure a quick victory.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Iran begins major counteroffensives
description: Tehran moved from defense toward recovery of lost territory.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Abadan siege broken
description: Iran achieved a key early victory by lifting the siege.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Khorramshahr recaptured by Iran
description: Iran recovered a major occupied city in a decisive success.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Iraq withdraws from much occupied Iranian territory
description: The war shifted into a new phase after Iranian counterattacks.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Iran carries war into Iraq
description: Tehran chose to continue the conflict rather than settle.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: War of attrition deepens
description: Neither side achieved decisive breakthrough as casualties mounted.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Tanker War begins
description: Attacks on shipping widened the conflict in the Gulf.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Chemical weapons use expands
description: Iraq increasingly used chemical weapons during the war.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.

description: Iran won a major battlefield success near the Gulf.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.

description: The UN pushed formally for a ceasefire and settlement.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: U.S. naval involvement increases in Gulf shipping protection
description: The wider internationalization of the conflict deepened.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Halabja chemical attack
description: The war's chemical dimension produced one of its most notorious atrocities.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Iran accepts ceasefire framework
description: Military pressure and exhaustion pushed Iran toward ending the war.

timeline_description: Major military, diplomatic, and political milestones in the Iran-Iraq War.
title: Ceasefire takes effect
description: The active fighting of the Iran-Iraq War formally ended.

timeline_description: Major mission, program, and historical milestones surrounding Apollo 11 and the first Moon landing.

timeline_description: Major mission, program, and historical milestones surrounding Apollo 11 and the first Moon landing.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: First known SARS cases appear in Guangdong
description: The outbreak began in southern China.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: International spread begins through travel
description: Cases linked to travel seeded outbreaks outside mainland China.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: WHO issues global alert
description: The disease was recognized as a major international public-health threat.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: Hong Kong outbreaks expand rapidly
description: Hospitals and residential clusters fueled major transmission.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: Vietnam outbreak gains attention
description: Health authorities identified severe transmission in Hanoi.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: Toronto outbreak begins
description: SARS spread into Canada in one of the largest outbreaks outside Asia.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: Travel advisories issued
description: International travel warnings became a central containment tool.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: Coronavirus identified as cause of SARS
description: Scientists determined the disease was caused by a novel coronavirus.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: China dismisses senior officials amid outbreak criticism
description: Political fallout accompanied criticism of transparency and reporting.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: Singapore intensifies quarantine controls
description: Aggressive contact tracing and isolation became key containment strategies.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: WHO names severe acute respiratory syndrome as global threat under control effort
description: International coordination strengthened surveillance and control.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: Outbreak peaks in several affected regions
description: Public-health systems were tested at maximum intensity.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: Transmission declines sharply in many places
description: Containment measures began to succeed.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: WHO lifts some travel advisories
description: Improving conditions signaled the outbreak was being brought under control.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: WHO declares global outbreak contained
description: The main chain of person-to-person transmission was interrupted.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: Laboratory-associated cases raise concern
description: Containment had succeeded, but biosafety risks remained.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: Animal-market and zoonotic-source investigations deepen
description: Attention focused increasingly on the likely animal origins of SARS.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: China reports small new cluster
description: Limited new cases showed the need for continuing vigilance.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: No sustained global return of SARS occurs
description: The outbreak remained historically important without becoming permanently endemic in humans.

timeline_description: Major epidemiological, scientific, and public-health milestones in the SARS outbreak of 2002–2004.
title: SARS experience informs responses to another coronavirus pandemic
description: Institutional lessons from SARS shaped early public-health thinking in COVID-19.
